name: Red Curry Paste (Nam Prik Kaeng Daeng)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cumin and coriander seeds in a pan without adding any oil.
2. Dry-fry them, stirring over medium heat for 1 to 2 minutes until they are slightly browned and give off a roasted aroma.
3. Coarsely chop the chilies and soak in water for 10 minutes. Drain.
4. Pound all the ingredients together to produce a fine paste. This curry paste pairs well with all meats.
(Note: The attribution line and posting information have been removed as per the instructions.)
